title: astragalus subcinereus
intro: Astragalus subcinereus, also known as the brown astragalus or Chinese milk vetch, is a type of flowering plant native to China and other parts of Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus subcinereus include improved immune function, reduced inflammation, and enhanced cardiovascular health, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Astragalus subcinereus can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal preparations to promote overall well-being and longevity.
